animeParadoxCodes.title: Anime Paradox X Codes
animeParadoxCodes.intro: Copy each code exactly as shown and redeem it from the Codes menu on the right side of the game screen. The working list was checked on July 16, 2026, and the archive keeps older launch, update, milestone, event, and compensation codes in one place.

redeemSteps: Launch Anime Paradox X in Roblox.
Select Codes from the menu on the right side of the screen.
Paste a working code into the Enter Code field.
Press Redeem and collect the rewards.
troubleshooting: The code was typed with the wrong capitalization, punctuation, or number of exclamation marks.
The code has expired after an update, event, milestone, or short compensation window.
The current server has not restarted since the code was released; rejoin a newer server.
The code was already redeemed on the same Roblox account.
The account has not reached the in-game requirement for code redemption.

animeParadoxBeginnerGuide.title: Anime Paradox X Beginner Guide
animeParadoxBeginnerGuide.intro: Anime Paradox X uses smart-AI units that fight around a central base while enemies approach from every direction. Fast progress comes from building a balanced six-slot roster, clearing Story until the next real wall, and upgrading the unit that solves that wall instead of spreading resources across the whole collection.

steps.title: Redeem the Current Codes
steps.goal: Start with the free Gems, Trait Rerolls, Gold, Stat Chips, Essences, and APX Coins.
actions: Open the Codes menu on the right and redeem every working code before summoning.
Use Gems to create a playable roster.
Keep Trait Rerolls, Stat Chips, Super Stat Chips, and rare Essences for units that will stay in the team.
steps.avoid: Do not spend premium upgrade resources on the first unit you pull.

steps.title: Build Roles Before Chasing Rarity
steps.goal: Create a team that can survive 360-degree pressure.
actions: Choose one main DPS carry.
Add one AoE or secondary DPS unit for wave clearing.
Use Bulla for economy whenever available.
Reserve one slot for healing or buffs and one slot for crowd control, tanking, or debuffs.
Use the final slot as a mode-specific flex pick.
steps.avoid: Do not fill every slot with pure DPS; difficult stages reward healing, buffs, slows, stuns, and farming.

steps.title: Use a Practical Starter Core
steps.goal: Clear early Story without waiting for Secret or Paradox units.
actions: Ciel (Super) is a practical early carry because it is easy to evolve and reaches full AoE.
Brolu (Super) provides scaling damage and frontline durability.
Kirrua (Godspeed) adds damage plus reliable crowd control.
Bulla handles economy, while Sakura can cover early support.
Shadow Vampire is an accessible AFK Chamber target with a powerful global Time Stop.
steps.avoid: Treat starter and temporary support units as stepping stones, not permanent Stat Chip or evolution-material targets.

steps.title: Push Story Until the Next Real Wall
steps.goal: Unlock progression and expose the exact weakness in the team.
actions: Clear Story acts in order and repeat the newest comfortable stage when levels or Gold are needed.
When a stage fails, identify whether the problem is boss damage, wave clear, survival, crowd control, or slow upgrades.
Fix that single role before returning to the stage.
steps.avoid: Do not abandon Story to farm every side mode at once.

steps.title: Upgrade in a Fixed Order
steps.goal: Turn one unit into a reliable carry before building the rest of the roster.
actions: Level the main carry first.
Evolve the carry when its evolved form adds a major passive, active ability, AoE upgrade, or scaling mechanic.
Improve Bulla and the main support enough to perform their roles.
Build the secondary DPS after the core three units are stable.
Use Stat Chips and Super Stat Chips on long-term Mythic, Secret, or Paradox units.
steps.avoid: Do not split levels, chips, and evolution items evenly across six unfinished units.

steps.title: Save Trait Rerolls for Long-Term Units
steps.goal: Avoid burning rerolls on temporary fillers.
actions: Use Eternal on many high-end DPS units.
Use Vampiric on units that need sustain or fight near the frontline.
Use Angelic or Blessing on dedicated support and healing units.
Use Greed on Bulla and other economy units.
Reroll after choosing the unit's permanent role and completing its main evolution path.
steps.avoid: Do not chase a perfect Mythic trait on a unit you plan to replace soon.

steps.title: Farm Targeted Midgame Unlocks
steps.goal: Replace starter slots with units tied to specific modes.
actions: Farm Ichuga from Legend Stage Hollow Act 3 for an early Secret carry.
Farm Sun Jin Wu from Raid Act 3 for long-mode scaling.
Buy Igrus from the Siege Shop and pair it with Sun Jin Wu.
Farm JJK Portals for Sakuno and Brojo when the team can clear them consistently.
Use Ragnar currency for Wukong, Buddha, and Poseidon when those units fill a real team need.
steps.avoid: Do not farm an endgame unit before the current team can clear its mode reliably.

steps.title: Lock In a Stable Progression Loop
steps.goal: Leave the first session with a clear next step.
actions: Confirm the main carry, economy unit, and one support or control unit are equipped.
Make sure Trait Rerolls and rare chips are saved rather than spent on fillers.
Pick the next unit or material farm before leaving the lobby.
steps.avoid: Do not log off without a chosen upgrade target for the next session.

checklist: One AoE or secondary DPS selected
Bulla or another economy option equipped
One healer, buffer, or control unit equipped
Story pushed until a clear upgrade wall
Trait Rerolls and rare chips saved
Next unit or material farm chosen before leaving the lobby

animeParadoxUnitTierList.title: Anime Paradox X Unit Tier List
animeParadoxUnitTierList.intro: The highest-value roster combines a scaling or global DPS carry with economy, healing or buffs, and crowd control. Endgame teams favor Secret and Paradox units, while several Mythic, Exclusive, Legendary, and Epic units remain important because they cover farming, healing, slowing, stunning, shielding, or starter progression.

units.name: Super Vegito (Transforming)
units.bestUse: Endgame teams and the hardest modes
units.acquisition: Complete the Elder Kai Vegeto quest after progressing through Tower of DBZ

units.name: Megumo (Ten Shadows)
units.bestUse: Infinite and boss fights through General Moharoga

units.name: Zid (Atomic)
units.bestUse: Infinite, Siege, and emergency map-wide burst

units.name: Death Reaper (Souls) / Hades
units.bestUse: Long fights, bosses, and difficult stages

units.name: Bumta (True Love) / Yuta
units.bestUse: Bosses, raids, and general endgame damage

units.name: Qun Sha Buang (Awakened) / Qin Shi Huang
Brojo (Six Eyes)
units.bestUse: Stuns, slows, damage amplification, raids, and portals

units.name: Igrus (Elite Knight)
units.evolutionPriority: Very high when paired with Sun Jin Wu

units.name: Maeto (True Form) / Mahito
units.acquisition: Evolve the Banner Mythic form into its Secret form

units.name: Kirrua (Godspeed)
units.bestUse: General progression, portals, and stun support

tiers.label: Strong role picks and reliable progression units

units.name: Panther Grimjaw (Resurreccion)
units.evolutionPriority: High if it is your best carry

units.name: Steel
units.bestUse: Stages where enemies overwhelm fragile carries

units.name: Shadow Vampire
units.bestUse: Time Stop utility in Infinite, Siege, and portals

units.name: Kasheemu (Electric)
units.bestUse: Long fights with steady enemy contact

units.name: Tuji (Heavenly Pact)
units.bestUse: Buffed enemies and general midgame content

units.name: Asto (Devil)
units.bestUse: Specific shielded enemies and reactive counter teams
units.evolutionPriority: Low unless the mode needs anti-shield

units.name: Itochi (Eternal Flame)
units.bestUse: Sustained combat where wave clear is covered elsewhere

tiers.label: Best support, healing, economy, and starter options

units.name: Idol (Pop)
units.bestUse: Permanent damage and attack-speed support after evolution

units.name: Oreheme (Sacred)
units.bestUse: High-damage stages and keeping frontline units alive

units.name: Brojo (Six Eyes)
units.bestUse: Hard bosses, raids, portals, and emergency control

units.name: Bulla
units.bestUse: Nearly every team that needs faster upgrades
units.evolutionPriority: Build early; do not overinvest in damage stats

units.name: Sakura
units.bestUse: Early Story before Mythic or Secret support units
units.evolutionPriority: Low; use as a temporary support

units.name: Shadow Vampire
units.bestUse: Stopping the entire map during dangerous waves

units.name: Ciel (Super)
units.bestUse: Early Story, easy evolution, and full-AoE wave clearing
units.evolutionPriority: High only while it is your main carry

animeParadoxBestTeams.title: Anime Paradox X Best Teams
animeParadoxBestTeams.intro: A complete team normally needs one primary carry, one secondary or global DPS unit, one economy unit, and enough healing, buffs, debuffs, stuns, slows, or tanking to keep the core alive. Replace a damage slot with support whenever the team dies before its damage can scale.

teams.name: Early-Game Story Team

slots.unit: Best boss or AoE unit available

teams.whyItWorks: Ciel or another Mythic carry clears early waves, Bulla accelerates upgrades, and support plus crowd control prevents the central base from being overwhelmed.

teams.name: Midgame Secret Progression Team
teams.whyItWorks: Ichuga and Sakuno supply strong single-target and bleed damage, Brojo controls dangerous waves, and Idol or Oreheme keeps the team stable while Bulla funds upgrades.
traitNotes: Eternal on Ichuga, Sakuno, and Brojo

teams.name: Endgame Meta Team

slots.unit: Qun Sha Buang (Awakened) / Qin Shi Huang

alternatives: Swap the flex DPS for Idol, Oreheme, or Executioner when survival is the problem

teams.whyItWorks: The team combines long-mode scaling, high sustained damage, anti-boss tools, control, global pressure, and economy. The fifth damage slot becomes a healer or support slot when survivability limits progress.
traitNotes: Vampiric or Eternal on Hades and Wukong
upgradeOrder: Bulla to the required economy breakpoint

teams.name: Infinite Team
teams.whyItWorks: Sun Jin Wu and Igrus scale together through kills, Storrk or Zid covers the map, Brojo or Shadow Vampire stops dangerous waves, and a healer or buffer keeps the scaling core alive.
traitNotes: Eternal on Sun Jin Wu, Igrus, and global DPS

teams.name: Siege Team
teams.whyItWorks: Global damage handles enemies approaching from every direction, Sun Jin Wu and Igrus scale during longer waves, and healing plus crowd control protects the core.
traitNotes: Eternal on the three DPS slots

teams.name: Boss and Raid Team

alternatives: Replace economy with a sixth combat unit in short encounters

teams.whyItWorks: Megumo, Hades, Bumta, Sakuno, and Ichuga supply strong boss damage, while Amun or Qin adds anti-boss value and Brojo, Idol, or Oreheme improves uptime and survival.
upgradeOrder: Bulla when the fight is long

teams.name: Portal Farming Team
teams.whyItWorks: Global or wide AoE clears repeated portal waves quickly, a dedicated boss carry finishes the final target, and control plus healing reduces failed runs.
traitNotes: Eternal on Zid and the boss carry

animeParadoxTraitsStatRerolls.title: Anime Paradox X Traits and Stat Rerolls
animeParadoxTraitsStatRerolls.intro: Eternal provides the largest overall combat increase, while Vampiric combines damage, cooldown reduction, and healing for units that fight near the frontline. Angelic strengthens buffers, Blessing improves dedicated healers, Greed belongs on economy units, and Zephyr is a strong attack-speed option while building toward a Mythic trait.
animeParadoxTraitsStatRerolls.subtitle: Match each trait to the unit's real role instead of chasing the rarest result on every character. Save premium rerolls and Super Stat Chips for evolved units that remain useful in raids, Siege, Infinite, and Towers.

traits.name: Eternal
traits.effect: +300% Damage, +100% HP, +50% Cooldown Reduction and Speed
traits.bestFor: Permanent DPS carries, scaling units, global AoE units, Infinite and Siege teams
traits.keepOrReroll: Always keep. Prioritize it on units such as Zid, Storrk, Megumo, Sun Jin Wu, Brolu, and other long-term carries.

traits.name: Vampiric
traits.effect: +100% Damage, +40% Cooldown Reduction, 5% Heal on Kill
traits.bestFor: Frontline DPS, bleed or burn units, fast attackers, and units that need self-sustain
traits.keepOrReroll: Keep on combat units such as Ichuga, Igrus, Kirrua, Grimjaw, Natzo, and other carries that regularly secure kills.

traits.name: Angelic
traits.effect: +30% to All Stats and +25% Buff Strength
traits.bestFor: Damage buffers, cooldown supports, and hybrid support units
traits.keepOrReroll: Keep on Idol, Gorhan, and other units whose main value comes from strengthening teammates.

traits.name: Blessing
traits.bestFor: Dedicated healers and defensive support units
traits.keepOrReroll: Keep on Oreheme and other healing-focused units. Reroll it when the unit's main job is damage or farming.

traits.name: Greed
traits.bestFor: Bulla, Sprintcart, and other economy units
traits.keepOrReroll: Keep on farming units because faster income brings expensive carries online earlier. Reroll it on damage, healing, and control units.

traits.name: Zephyr
traits.bestFor: High-attack-speed units, on-hit passives, stun units, and stacking attackers
traits.keepOrReroll: Keep as a strong progression trait on units such as Kirrua or Kasheemu until Eternal or Vampiric becomes available.

traits.name: Slayer
traits.bestFor: Raid bosses, Boss Rush, Tower bosses, and single-target specialists
traits.keepOrReroll: Keep on a developing boss team. Replace it later when the same unit receives Eternal or Vampiric.

traits.name: Stat Chips and Super Stat Chips
traits.rollRate: Earned from codes, progression rewards, shops, and update rewards
traits.effect: Rerolls a unit's individual stat grades to improve its combat performance
traits.bestFor: Evolved main carry first, then endgame hybrid, healer, support, and economy unit
traits.keepOrReroll: Use normal Stat Chips to build acceptable rolls. Reserve Super Stat Chips for completed Secret, Paradox, Exclusive, or top Mythic units.

animeParadoxEvolutionEtherealization.title: Anime Paradox X Evolution and Etherealization
animeParadoxEvolutionEtherealization.intro: Evolution routes are tied to specific modes and currencies. JJK units use Sorcerer and Portal resources, Igrus uses Siege rewards, Sun Jin Wu uses Raid progression, and Ichuga comes from Hollow Legend stages. Build a complete carry before spreading rare Essences, Stat Chips, and rerolls across unfinished units.
animeParadoxEvolutionEtherealization.subtitle: Finish one valuable unit at a time: level it, improve its stats, complete Etherealization, collect its evolution materials, and then invest premium traits. Evolved forms unlock the passives and active abilities used by current endgame teams.

items.requirements: Level the unit and submit the materials displayed in its Etherealize menu
items.materialSource: Story, Legend stages, Raids, Siege, Portals, shops, codes, and update rewards
items.upgradeGain: Permanent unit growth that prepares the character for its final evolution and harder modes
items.priority: Complete before heavy Super Stat Chip or Mythic trait investment

items.requirements: 25 Heavenly Wheels plus the listed Essence materials
items.materialSource: Gold Merchant and Sorcerer Shop routes; the Gold route costs 75,000 Gold per Heavenly Wheel
items.upgradeGain: Unlocks the General Moharoga summon, stronger damage scaling, cooldown effects, and improved boss performance
items.priority: Very High · One of the strongest long-mode and boss investments

items.materialSource: Sorcerer Shop or JJK Portals; each shop Finger costs 20,000 Cursed Energy
items.upgradeGain: Adds powerful boss damage, enemy damage amplification, damage reduction debuffs, and a map-wide Domain attack
items.priority: Very High · Strong for Portals, Raids, Boss Rush, and Towers

items.materialSource: Raid Act 3 and the Raid Shop; the evolution route requires 1,450 Raid Coins
items.upgradeGain: Improves kill scaling, cooldown reduction, sustain, execute effects, and synergy with Igrus
items.priority: Very High · Core carry for Infinite and other extended modes

items.materialSource: Siege Shop; each Broken Igrus Helmet costs 1,000 Siege Coins
items.upgradeGain: Adds strong bleed damage, self-healing, kill-based damage growth, and direct Sun Jin Wu synergy
items.priority: High · Build after unlocking a reliable Siege farming team

items.requirements: Complete 30 Legend Stage matches for the evolution route
items.materialSource: Hollow Legend stages, including the Act 3 secret-unit route
items.upgradeGain: Provides strong bleed damage, self-buffs, healing, and dependable early-to-endgame boss performance
items.priority: High · One of the best reachable progression carries

animeParadoxGameModesFarming.title: Anime Paradox X Game Modes and Farming
animeParadoxGameModesFarming.intro: A reliable farming route starts with Story first clears, then moves into the mode connected to the player's next evolution. Use Raids for Sun Jin Wu progression, Siege for Igrus, JJK Portals for Sukuno and Brojo, Hollow Legend stages for Ichuga, and long modes for Gems, experience, and scaling-unit value.
animeParadoxGameModesFarming.subtitle: Choose the mode that drops the exact resource blocking your next upgrade. Story opens progression, Legend stages supply specialized units and materials, while Raids, Siege, Portals, Infinite, Towers, and the AFK Chamber support later account growth.

modes.mainRewards: Account experience, unit experience, Gems, Gold, world progression, and access to advanced modes
modes.recommendedTeam: Starter · One dependable DPS, one economy unit, and one support or healer
modes.farmingTargets: First-clear rewards, account levels, early summons, and the Act 6 progression gates
modes.strategy: Upgrade the main carry first, keep economy active, and clear each available world before repeatedly farming an early stage.

modes.mainRewards: Secret-unit routes, unit-specific evolution materials, Essences, and repeat-clear progression
modes.recommendedTeam: Midgame · Evolved Mythic carry, healer, economy unit, and boss damage
modes.farmingTargets: Hollow Act 3 for Ichuga, JJK evolution materials, Broly materials, and other unit-specific requirements
modes.strategy: Farm only the Legend world connected to the unit being evolved. Use healing and crowd control when the stage contains sustained chip damage.

modes.mainRewards: Raid Coins or Tokens, Raid Shop items, evolution resources, Trait Rerolls, and the Sun Jin Wu Act 3 secret route
modes.recommendedTeam: Mid-to-Late Game · Evolved boss DPS, healer, buffer, economy unit, and durable frontline
modes.farmingTargets: Sun Jin Wu, his Monarch evolution item, Raid Shop stock, and weekly reroll purchases
modes.strategy: Build around single-target damage and survival. The Raid Shop exchanges 15 Raid Tokens for one Trait Reroll with a weekly stock of 150.

modes.mainRewards: Siege Coins or Tokens, Igrus, Broken Igrus Helmets, shop items, and Trait Rerolls
modes.recommendedTeam: Late Game · Wide-area DPS, crowd control, healing, economy, and at least one scaling carry
modes.farmingTargets: Igrus, Elite Knight evolution materials, Siege Shop stock, and monthly rerolls
modes.strategy: Prioritize units that cover several directions and remain effective through long waves. The Siege Shop exchanges 250 Siege Tokens for one Trait Reroll with a monthly stock of 150.

modes.mainRewards: Long-run Gems, account and unit experience, milestones, and repeatable progression
modes.recommendedTeam: Late Game · Kill-scaling carry, Bulla, healer, control unit, and wide-area damage
modes.farmingTargets: Gems, experience, achievement progress, and testing completed endgame teams
modes.strategy: Use Sun Jin Wu with Igrus for kill scaling, then add Bulla for economy and Idol, Oreheme, Brojo, or another support for sustain and control.

modes.mainRewards: Portal currencies, evolution materials, secret units, event rewards, and Sorcerer or Ragnarok resources
modes.recommendedTeam: Mid-to-Late Game · Evolved DPS, crowd control, healer, and coordinated co-op roles for high tiers
modes.farmingTargets: Sukuno and Brojo from JJK routes; Soji Okita, Qin Shi Huang, and Hades from Secret Portals; Wukong, Buddha, and Poseidon through Ragnarok progression
modes.strategy: Repeat the highest portal tier that clears consistently. Spend Sorcerer and Ragnarok currency on required evolution items before buying optional resources.

modes.mainRewards: Floor milestones, difficult boss clears, exclusive units, and endgame quest progression
modes.recommendedTeam: Endgame · Multiple evolved top-tier units, healer, buffer, economy unit, and strong boss control
modes.farmingTargets: DBZ Tower progression, Brotenks, and the Super Vegito quest route
modes.strategy: Treat Towers as the final roster check. Complete easier Secret and Mythic evolutions before investing heavily in the Super Vegito route.

modes.mainRewards: Passive Gems, experience, idle progression, and exclusive-unit opportunities
modes.recommendedTeam: Any stable roster · Favor fast and consistent clears over maximum boss damage
modes.farmingTargets: Idle account growth, Shadow Vampire, and Megomun access
modes.strategy: Enter before leaving the game idle and collect rewards between active farming sessions. Use active play for unit-specific materials that the chamber does not provide.

animeParadoxUpdatesPatchNotes.title: Anime Paradox X Updates and Patch Notes
animeParadoxUpdatesPatchNotes.intro: Anime Paradox X continues the original Anime Paradox progression with a refreshed release, active reward bundles, new content routes, and revised unit balance. New units, passives, evolution forms, and mode rewards can immediately change which carries, supports, and farming targets deserve resources first.
animeParadoxUpdatesPatchNotes.subtitle: Follow the re-release, new reward codes, portal fixes, update units, mode additions, and major balance reworks. Each entry highlights the changes that directly affect team building, evolution priorities, and farming routes.

changes: Continued the re-release reward cycle alongside OOPSIES!!, Re-Release!, PARADOX!!, HolyMoly, and NoctisBoctis.
Distributed additional progression resources through active code rewards.
entries.metaImpact: Extra Trait Rerolls, Stat Chips, Gems, Gold, and Essences make it faster to rebuild a completed carry and begin advanced evolution farming.

changes: Applied a portal-related hotfix through refreshed game servers.
Restarted active servers so the portal changes could take effect.
Restored the intended portal progression and farming flow.
entries.metaImpact: Portal teams returned to normal farming routes for JJK, Ragnarok, secret-unit, currency, and evolution-material progression.

changes: Re-released and rebranded the experience as Anime Paradox X.
Reset the progression race around current banners, game modes, traits, Etherealization, and evolution systems.
Released reward bundles containing Trait Rerolls, Gems, Gold, APX Coins, Essences, Stat Chips, and Super Stat Chips.
entries.metaImpact: Players should complete one evolved carry, secure an economy unit, and add healing or crowd control before spending heavily on perfect traits.

changes: Added SBR-themed progression, units, and Race Trophy rewards.
Expanded update rewards through UPDATE3.5!, SBR!, NyoHo, and FreeTrophies.
Added cosmetic combination options for weapon animations, units, and unit effects.
entries.metaImpact: New units and Race Trophy routes expanded Portal and event farming, while large reroll and chip rewards accelerated endgame optimization.

changes: Added Fate-themed units, currencies, evolution routes, and progression rewards.
Expanded Boss Rush as a late-game unit and resource route.
Introduced reward support through UPDATE3!, FATE!, and related update codes.
entries.metaImpact: Sustained boss damage, healing, damage amplification, and survivability became more valuable for consecutive boss encounters.

changes: Overhauled units released from Update 1.5 onward.
Adjusted passives, evolved abilities, damage output, support value, and unit interactions.
Reworked the performance of older roster options across difficult modes.
entries.metaImpact: Previous rankings were reshaped, increasing the value of complete evolved kits, role-based traits, healing, crowd control, and team synergy.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Anime Paradox X

questions.question: What is Anime Paradox X?
questions.answer: Anime Paradox X is a 360-degree smart-AI anime tower defense game on Roblox. Summoned units defend a central base while enemies approach from every direction, and it is the re-released, rebranded version of the original Anime Paradox.

questions.question: Where can I play Anime Paradox X?
questions.answer: Anime Paradox X is free to play on Roblox. Open the official game page, join an active server, and redeem the latest codes from the in-game Codes menu to claim free rewards.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in Anime Paradox X?
questions.answer: Open the Codes menu on the right side of the Anime Paradox X screen, paste a working code into the Enter Code field, and press Redeem. Codes grant Trait Rerolls, Gems, Gold, Stat Chips, Essences, and APX Coins.

questions.question: What are the best units in Anime Paradox X?
questions.answer: Top-tier Anime Paradox X units include Secret and Paradox carries such as Storrk, Megumo, Zid, Sakuno, Bumta, and Sun Jin Wu. Pair them with the economy unit Bulla and support options like Idol, Oreheme, or Brojo for full teams.

questions.question: What are Traits in Anime Paradox X?
questions.answer: Traits are rollable passive bonuses in Anime Paradox X. Eternal and Vampiric are the strongest for damage carries, Angelic and Blessing suit support and healing units, and Greed belongs on economy units like Bulla.

questions.question: How does evolution work in Anime Paradox X?
questions.answer: Anime Paradox X units evolve through Etherealization and mode-specific materials. JJK units use Sorcerer resources, Igrus uses Siege coins, Sun Jin Wu uses Raid coins, and Ichuga comes from Hollow Legend stages.

cta.title: Ready to Play Anime Paradox X?
cta.description: Join the Anime Paradox X community on Discord for codes, tier lists, and updates, or jump into the game on Roblox!
